top_signals.title: Oil prices fall as Trump postpones Iran strike, easing supply disruption fears
top_signals.summary: Oil prices fell after U.S. President Donald Trump said he would postpone a planned military strike on Iran following requests from key Middle Eastern leaders.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: 5 Steps to Managing Shadow AI Tools Without Slowing Down Employees
top_signals.summary: Many employees already use shadow AI tools at work without security review. Adaptive Security breaks down how teams can build practical AI governance without adding friction for employees. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
